title: Metallic Balloons 50 Pcs 12 Inch Assorted Colors Multicoloured Shiny Glossy Latex Balloons for Birthday Wedding Party Decoration

These coloured balloons are just perfect for all your party decoration needs.

【Support Helium&Air】The multicoloured balloons can be filled with helium or air, It is recommended to use pump inflation DO NOT overfill them to prevent popping. You can have these perfect decorations in just a few minutes!

【ATTENTION & WARNING】Avoid direct sunlight, and keep away from sharp objects and excessive friction. ​If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us! we will give you a full refund. Your problem can be solved within 24 hours.
